title: lora_l2.h tx function takes non-const data pointer despite not needing mutation
description:
lora_l2.h line 114: int lichen_lora_l2_tx(uint8_t *data, size_t len) - the data pointer is non-const. The comment says 'may be mutated by driver' but the actual implementation (lora_send) in Zephyr should not require mutation. If mutation is truly possible, the comment is correct; if not, the signature should be const uint8_t *data for caller clarity.

Verify: Check Zephyr's lora_send() signature. If it takes const, change this to const.
